items.title: Final/OT: Sparks 111, Mercury 102. Kelsey Plum will get the headlines, and rightfully so, but Cameron Brink, Nneka Ogwumike, and Rae Burrell all had lasting imprints on this one, as did the whole team. Plum scored a franchise-record-tying 43 points. Sparks are 7-6. What a game.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final/OT: Sparks 111, Mercury 102. Kelsey Plum will get the headlines, and rightfully so, but Cameron Brink, Nneka Ogwumike, and Rae Burrell all had lasting imprints on this one, as did the whole team. Plum scored a franchise-record-tying 43 points. Sparks are 7-6. What a game.

items.title: The Spurs were -8 in 16 minutes in the clutch in the finals (game within 5 over the last 4 minutes) and were -13.7 points-per-100-possessions. The problem, of course, was their offense. They averaged just 89.2 points/100 poss.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: The Spurs were -8 in 16 minutes in the clutch in the finals (game within 5 over the last 4 minutes) and were -13.7 points-per-100-possessions. The problem, of course, was their offense. They averaged just 89.2 points/100 poss.

items.title: NBA franchises that have waited 54+ years in the NBA for a title entering the 2026-27 season:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
NBA franchises that have waited 54+ years in the NBA for a title entering the 2026-27 season:

Rochester to Sacramento Kings: 75 seasons w/o title

St Louis to Atlanta Hawks: 68 seasons w/o title

Phoenix Suns: 58 seasons w/o title

Buffalo to LA Clippers: 56 seasons w/o title

items.title: The league isn't that old yet
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The league isn't that old yet

The Knicks set a record for longest title drought *broken* at 53 years.

The previous longest *broken* drought was when Bucks won it in 2021, their first title in 50 years

items.title: Knicks may have just finished off the greatest NBA playoff run ever.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks may have just finished off the greatest NBA playoff run ever.

NYK finished with the largest margin of victory ever by a champion — 14.9 points per game.

Their 13 straight wins are the 2nd-longest playoff winning streak ever.

16-3 record. One loss over the last 3 rounds.

items.title: Natasha Mack got a sensational look to win the game in regulation. No dice. We are headed to overtime. It is 98-98 between the Sparks and Mercury. Kelsey Plum has 41 points, including 19 in the fourth. She scored the Sparks’ last 17 points in the quarter.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Natasha Mack got a sensational look to win the game in regulation. No dice. We are headed to overtime. It is 98-98 between the Sparks and Mercury. Kelsey Plum has 41 points, including 19 in the fourth. She scored the Sparks’ last 17 points in the quarter.

Speaking only for me (and perhaps others) there will be no whitewashing here of Jim Dolan.

I'm trying to think of a bigger disconnect between the likeability of a championship team and the likeability of the championship owner.

items.title: Oh my word this is some unreal hoops. Natasha Mack gets free on an inbounds pass with 1.3 on the shot clock and puts it in to give the Mercury a 98-96 lead on the Sparks with 12.2 left. And then Kelsey Plum ties it on a slot cut with 1.6 left! 98-98!
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Oh my word this is some unreal hoops. Natasha Mack gets free on an inbounds pass with 1.3 on the shot clock and puts it in to give the Mercury a 98-96 lead on the Sparks with 12.2 left. And then Kelsey Plum ties it on a slot cut with 1.6 left! 98-98!

items.title: I often think about that video of young Jalen Brunson and his dad working out. He looks exhausted, he’s on concrete, the drills aren’t crisp. You‘d never know he will be a Finals MVP.
items.author: Tom Westerholm
items.body_excerpt:
I often think about that video of young Jalen Brunson and his dad working out. He looks exhausted, he’s on concrete, the drills aren’t crisp. You‘d never know he will be a Finals MVP.

But if you stack days where you don’t feel like being there and build brick by brick, special things can happen.

items.author: Fred Katz
items.body_excerpt:
ANNOUNCEMENT: Under The Bright Lights, my upcoming book about how the Knicks built a champion, is now AVAILABLE FOR PREORDER!

I've spent years working on the book, which will chronicle never-before-told stories with a heavy focus on the title run.

Link: www.simonandschuster.com/books/Under-...

items.title: Rough sequence for the Sparks that ends in a Lexi Held 3-pointer to give the Mercury a 93-90 lead with 1:32 left. Sparks are going to need to pull this one out of the fire.
items.author: Justin Russo
